name: recall_smoke
description: Hand-labelled fixture used to smoke-test the recall pipeline. Not a competition benchmark — every row is short and the relevance judgments are obvious. Plug in LongMemEval-S or a custom JSON file for real numbers.

corpus.body: rust workspace cargo build profile dev opt-level 0
rust lint clippy deny warnings before commit

python pytest fixture monkeypatch conftest sharing
typescript bun runtime test bundler all in one

go module replace directive local path development
go net http server graceful shutdown context
